p2p_enrich.notes: Added 8 pass_to_pass tests covering repo CI/CD gates. The container is minimal (Python 3.12 + git only, no Node.js), so CI commands are Python-focused. Discovered CI commands: electron repo uses 'node script/yarn.js lint' (pylint via depot_tools for Python, eslint for JS), 'node script/yarn.js tsc -p tsconfig.script.json' (TypeScript check), and 'apply-patches.yml' workflow. Container lacks Node.js so these cannot run directly. P2P tests added: (1) Python syntax checks: py_compile on git.py, patches.py, all script/lib/*.py; (2) Module import: git module imports successfully, exports UPSTREAM_HEAD; (3) Helper function tests: split_patches, munge_subject_to_filename, filter_patches all work correctly. All 8 p2p tests pass on base commit AND after gold fix. All 10 existing f2p tests still pass after gold fix (18/18 total).
ci_commands_found: node script/yarn.js lint (needs Node.js + depot_tools - not available in container)
node script/yarn.js tsc -p tsconfig.script.json (needs Node.js - not available in container)
python3 -m py_compile script/lib/git.py (works, added as p2p)
python3 -m py_compile script/lib/patches.py (works, added as p2p)
python3 -m py_compile script/lib/*.py (works, added as p2p)
ruff check script/lib/ (works but requires pip install, not added)

validate.notes: All four checks pass. Fixed Dockerfile to create /workspace/task directory with symlink to /tests. NOP test: 10 f2p tests fail on buggy base (correct), 8 p2p tests pass. Gold test: all 18 tests pass after solve.sh patch. Rubric: Gold solution follows all 3 rules (code style, authorship preservation, naming conventions). Docker build succeeded.
